topics.label: EXPLAIN Plans
topics.description: Read execution plans — seq scan vs index scan, join types, cost.

topics.label: Index Optimization
topics.description: Create, analyze, and maintain indexes. Unused index cleanup.

topics.label: Query Rewriting
topics.description: Avoid subqueries, use CTEs, minimize SELECT *, and optimize JOINs.

topics.label: Partitioning
topics.description: Table partitioning by range, list, or hash for large tables.
